Class WorldMapTest

java.lang.Object
jogo.engine.WorldMapTest
public class WorldMapTest extends Object
Test class for the WorldMap class. This class tests the main behavior of the game map, including adding structures, checking occupied spaces, validating coordinates, checking player interaction permissions, generating resources and consuming resources.
Author:
Fabio Cruz, Tiago Silva

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description

    Description
    (package private) void
    addStructuresOutsideTheMap()
    Tests if adding a structure outside the map boundaries throws CoordinatesOutOfBoundsException.
    (package private) void
    addStructuresThrowingSpaceAlreadyOccupiedException()
    Tests if adding a structure to an already occupied position throws SpaceAlreadyOccupiedException.
    (package private) void
    addStructuresWithoutThrows()
    Tests if a structure can be added to the map without throwing exceptions.
    (package private) void
    canInteract()
    Tests if the owner of a structure can interact with it.
    (package private) void

    Tests if interacting outside the map boundaries throws CoordinatesOutOfBoundsException.
    (package private) void
    canInteractThrowsStructureDontExistException()
    Tests if interacting with an empty map position throws StructureDontExistException.
    (package private) void
    canInteractThrowsUnauthorizedActionException()
    Tests if a player cannot interact with a structure that belongs to another player.
    (package private) void
    getNullStructuresInsideTheMap()
    Tests if getting a structure from an empty position inside the map returns null.
    (package private) void
    getStructuresInfoOutsideMap()
    Tests if getting a structure outside the map boundaries throws CoordinatesOutOfBoundsException.
    (package private) void
    getStructuresInsideTheMap()
    Tests if getting a structure inside the map works correctly.
    (package private) void
    setUp()
    Creates a new player and a new empty map before each test.
    (package private) void
    spaceIsNotOccupied()
    Tests if an empty map position is correctly detected as not occupied.
    (package private) void
    spaceIsOccupied()
    Tests if a map position is correctly detected as occupied.
    (package private) void
    spaceIsOccupiedOutsideMap()
    Tests if checking occupation outside the map boundaries throws CoordinatesOutOfBoundsException.
    (package private) void
    testConsumeResourcesDamagingTheStructure()
    Tests if consuming resources damages a structure when the player does not have enough resources.
    (package private) void
    testConsumeResourcesDestroyingTheStructure()
    Tests if consuming resources destroys a structure when its level reaches zero.
    (package private) void
    testConsumeResourcesWithoutDamagingTheStructure()
    Tests if consuming resources does not damage a structure when the player has enough resources.
    (package private) void
    testGenerateResources()
    Tests if structures generate resources correctly.

  • Constructor Details

    • WorldMapTest

      public WorldMapTest()

  • Method Details

    • setUp

      @BeforeEach void setUp()
      Creates a new player and a new empty map before each test. This ensures that every test starts with a clean map and a fresh player.

    • addStructuresWithoutThrows

      @Test void addStructuresWithoutThrows() throws GameException
      Tests if a structure can be added to the map without throwing exceptions. The test adds a Forest to position 0,0 and then verifies if the structure stored in that position is really a Forest.
      Throws:
      GameException - if an unexpected game error occurs

    • addStructuresThrowingSpaceAlreadyOccupiedException

      @Test void addStructuresThrowingSpaceAlreadyOccupiedException() throws GameException
      Tests if adding a structure to an already occupied position throws SpaceAlreadyOccupiedException.
      Throws:
      GameException - if an unexpected game error occurs while preparing the test

    • addStructuresOutsideTheMap

      @Test void addStructuresOutsideTheMap()
      Tests if adding a structure outside the map boundaries throws CoordinatesOutOfBoundsException.

    • getStructuresInsideTheMap

      @Test void getStructuresInsideTheMap() throws GameException
      Tests if getting a structure inside the map works correctly. A Forest is added to the map and then retrieved from the same position.
      Throws:
      GameException - if an unexpected game error occurs

    • getNullStructuresInsideTheMap

      @Test void getNullStructuresInsideTheMap() throws GameException
      Tests if getting a structure from an empty position inside the map returns null.
      Throws:
      GameException - if an unexpected game error occurs

    • getStructuresInfoOutsideMap

      @Test void getStructuresInfoOutsideMap()
      Tests if getting a structure outside the map boundaries throws CoordinatesOutOfBoundsException.

    • spaceIsOccupied

      @Test void spaceIsOccupied() throws GameException
      Tests if a map position is correctly detected as occupied.
      Throws:
      GameException - if an unexpected game error occurs

    • spaceIsNotOccupied

      @Test void spaceIsNotOccupied() throws GameException
      Tests if an empty map position is correctly detected as not occupied.
      Throws:
      GameException - if an unexpected game error occurs

    • spaceIsOccupiedOutsideMap

      @Test void spaceIsOccupiedOutsideMap() throws GameException
      Tests if checking occupation outside the map boundaries throws CoordinatesOutOfBoundsException.
      Throws:
      GameException - if an unexpected game error occurs while preparing the test

    • canInteract

      @Test void canInteract() throws GameException
      Tests if the owner of a structure can interact with it.
      Throws:
      GameException - if an unexpected game error occurs

    • canInteractThrowsStructureDontExistException

      @Test void canInteractThrowsStructureDontExistException()
      Tests if interacting with an empty map position throws StructureDontExistException.

    • canInteractThrowsUnauthorizedActionException

      @Test void canInteractThrowsUnauthorizedActionException() throws GameException
      Tests if a player cannot interact with a structure that belongs to another player. Expected result: UnauthorizedActionException is thrown.
      Throws:
      GameException - if an unexpected game error occurs while preparing the test

    • canInteractOutsideMap

      @Test void canInteractOutsideMap()
      Tests if interacting outside the map boundaries throws CoordinatesOutOfBoundsException.

    • testGenerateResources

      @Test void testGenerateResources() throws GameException
      Tests if structures generate resources correctly. A Forest is added to the map and then resource generation is triggered. The test verifies if the player's wood quantity increased.
      Throws:
      GameException - if an unexpected game error occurs

    • testConsumeResourcesWithoutDamagingTheStructure

      @Test void testConsumeResourcesWithoutDamagingTheStructure() throws GameException
      Tests if consuming resources does not damage a structure when the player has enough resources. The test checks if the structure level stays the same.
      Throws:
      GameException - if an unexpected game error occurs

    • testConsumeResourcesDamagingTheStructure

      @Test void testConsumeResourcesDamagingTheStructure() throws GameException
      Tests if consuming resources damages a structure when the player does not have enough resources. The structure is first upgraded to level 2. Then the player's inventory is cleared. After consuming resources, the structure level should decrease by 1.
      Throws:
      GameException - if an unexpected game error occurs

    • testConsumeResourcesDestroyingTheStructure

      @Test void testConsumeResourcesDestroyingTheStructure() throws GameException
      Tests if consuming resources destroys a structure when its level reaches zero. The player's inventory is cleared, forcing the structure to lose level. Since the structure starts at level 1, it should be removed from the map.
      Throws:
      GameException - if an unexpected game error occurs
